title: Weaponsmith
body:
# This mod is a mod for combat and PvP.
</details>

It's main purpose is as a new way of using trims. Each trims has different powers, cooldowns and textures. Just put a netherite sword in a smithing table with a smithing tamplate and the gem of the color you want. 
Here are the few available right now : 
<details>
  
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

- Coast: is a more powerful instant trident
- Dune : Makes entities in range slower
- Eye : Lets you throw an enderpearl 
- Host : Makes you ride the nearest player in a 4 block range
- Raiser : deals netherite axe damage
- Rib : Gives you resistance 1 for 10 seconds
- Sentry : sets entities one block lower
- Shaper : gives negative knockback
- Silence : Cancel the ability to use trim abilities
- Snout : Gives a random Sniffer plant
- Spire : Give levitation to entities you hit
- Tide : instant trident that can be used any time
- Vex : Spawn a friendly Vex
- Ward : casts a zone that deals AOE damage
- Wayfinder : teleports entitites to you
- Wild : Acts like a bonemeal

</details>

For now, there is only few things available. 
You might also see unobtainable items. For now, there are unused, but they will be in future updates.
